name: Wood

name: Egg

name: Apple
description: Eat to gain 15 energy. Farming boost (15 min): harvests yield +1 crop.

name: Pear
description: Eat to gain 15 energy. Farming boost (15 min): new plantings on your tile grow 15% faster.

name: Peach
description: Eat to gain 15 energy. Farming boost (15 min): harvests yield at least 6 crops.

name: Lemon
description: Eat to gain 15 energy. Farming boost (15 min): new crops you plant grow 15% faster.

name: Tadpole
description: Very common. Baby frog found in ponds.

name: Bullfrog
description: Uncommon. Big and grumpy.

description: Common small pond fish.

description: Common small pond fish.

name: Red Chubfish
description: Common small pond fish.

name: Catfish

description: Uncommon panfish found in calm water.

name: Orange Bluegill
description: Uncommon sunfish with vivid orange colouring.

name: Blue Bluegill
description: Uncommon sunfish with deep blue colouring.

name: Yellow Bluegill
description: Uncommon sunfish with golden colouring.

name: Crucian Carp
description: Uncommon hardy carp. Sought after by collectors.

description: Rare. Only found near lily pads.

name: Albino Catfish
description: Rare albino variant. Fetch a high price.

name: Golden Koi
description: Extremely rare. Worth its weight in gold.

name: Combat Health Potion
description: Recovers 15 health points during fights.

name: Combat Stamina Potion
description: Recovers 15 stamina points during fights.

description: Allows bulk x100 crafting at any station. Consumed on use.

description: Harvested from a Beehive. Used in crafting.

name: Chicken Feed
description: Feed your chickens. Each bag adds 5 units to the coop feed bin.

name: White Egg
description: Incubate in a Chicken Coop. 36hr hatch. 30% White, 30% Black chicken, 40% fail.

name: Gold Egg
description: Incubate in a Chicken Coop. 36hr hatch. Chance at all 4 chicken types. Gold is rare.

name: White Chicken
description: Common. Lives in the Coop. Produces 1 egg per collect when fed.

name: Black Chicken
description: Uncommon. Lives in the Coop. Produces 1 egg per collect when fed.

name: Brown Chicken
description: Uncommon. Lives in the Coop. Produces 2 eggs per collect when fed.

name: Gold Chicken
description: Rare. Lives in the Coop. Produces 3 eggs per collect when fed.

description: A wild oak. Belongs to its forest tile â€” cannot be moved.

description: Send items and letters to other players. 0.01 gold tax per item type sent.
